case_title: LYDIA ELAINE DUNCAN VS. MARY A GASTINELL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUNCAN, LYDIA ELAINE AS TO DEFENDANT GASTINELL, MARY A IND. DBA GASTNELL'S TENDER LOVING CARE RESIDENCE HOME JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
